name: Truffier Au Chocolat a La Cafe De Paris
recipeInstructions:
1 Cut the cake into two layers using a serrated knife or thread and place one layer in a 9 inch springform pan.
2 Melt the chocolate and fondant using a double boiler over hot water, or in a microwave oven set to medium power for 12 minutes (chocolate) and 20 seconds (fondant).
3 Heat the whipping cream to lukewarm. If using a microwave, allow 30 seconds.
4 Beat the remaining whipping cream until it forms soft peaks; set aside.
5 In a large bowl, combine the warm melted chocolate and fondant mixture with the chilled whipping cream. Stir until well blended and the temperature is reduced to lukewarm.
6 Gradually beat in the whipped cream into the chocolate mixture.
7 Spoon half of the creamy chocolate mixture over one layer of cake.
8 Top with the second layer of cake.
9 Spread the remaining chocolate mixture evenly over the top of the cake.
10 Refrigerate the cake for 8 to 12 hours before serving.
11 Serve chilled with whipping cream and chocolate curls.
